name: Team Rocket’s Lillie & Lusamine (DREVOD)
description:
Why the fuck is this my most popular bot I don’t like this one

LILLIE IS AGED UP!! DO NOT CRY IN THE REVIEWS OR YOU’LL GET BLOCKED!!

A bit unconventional from what I usually do, but I still wanna make this more normal-ish to what I usually do. (Can u tell I like Pokémon by the way?)

Artist is Drevod, I’ve seen some of the other girls except these two so yeah

Just like with every bot… Enjoy!
